name: Tip Jar
description: A simple tip jar contract on Arbitrum Stylus.
cargoToml:
[package]
name = "tip-jar"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
stylus-sdk = "0.10.2"
alloy-primitives = "0.7"
alloy-sol-types = "0.7"

[features]
export-abi = ["stylus-sdk/export-abi"]

[lib]
crate-type = ["lib", "cdylib"]

uiSchema.title: Tip Jar
uiSchema.description: A simple smart contract for collecting tips.

children.content: This contract allows users to send ETH tips. The contract owner can withdraw the collected tips.
